name: Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
2. Mix cottage cheese with bread crumbs, chopped chives, egg substitute, herbs and spices (omit paprika).
3. Preheat oven to 350-375°F (175-190°C).
4. Spread a thin layer of tomato sauce on the bottom of a large baking dish.
5. Layer lasagna noodles, cottage cheese mixture, diced peppers and onions, sliced tomatoes, more tomato sauce, additional layers of noodles, herbs, and pepper.
6. Top with low-fat mozzarella cheese (if using) and sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon paprika.
7. Bake for 45 minutes or until heated through and bubbly.
